photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

Injury.title: Injury
Injury.description: Represents a single sports injury log.

userId.description: The ID of the user who logged the injury.

type.description: The type of injury (e.g., Ankle Sprain).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the injury was logged.

Treatment.title: Treatment
Treatment.description: Represents a recovery activity for an injury.

activity.description: The recovery activity performed (e.g., Icing, Stretching).

date.description: The date the treatment was performed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the treatment was logged.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information for each user.

/users/{userId}/injuries/{injuryId}.description: Stores injury logs for each user.

/users/{userId}/injuries/{injuryId}/trea.description: Stores treatment logs for each injury.
